reviews.review_description:
This game is fucing terrible, 

first of all the ai in this game play like there name is “tuaturntheballover” every pass is either a rocket over your fucing head or is a snail like pass to the other teams stick. Plus when your playing 3s the bots like to cherry pick in your d zone the whole game then finally when you can break it out they go and run straight into you taking the ball and leaving you out to dry. After that they go and turn the ball over to the other team. Next when you take it out the d zone the other teams bots run at you like Usain Bolt and hunt you down like you took his crack. 

The goalies: the goalies are the most bipolar losers in this whole game 
1. Can’t save a simple forhand backhand to save there life’s. 

2. Next when the goalies try to pass the ball just like the ais they can give you a soft as baby  baby shi pass or can throw a puck 6 over your head.

3. The player base 
I feel like every player in this game or league is 9 years old, which sucks because they are the most anyoing players to play against ever 

4. Ping 
This is the only game to ever make having 150 and advantage glueing the ball to there sticks like they have owes wax on it 

5. The ball goes through my stick ever 4 seconds 

6. There these dumb little kids or players that join the game and just throw the ball down the ice like I’m in a pro lobby and these little kids come and just beat saber me and chuck the ball down the ice

This is the worst game made if you have stick drift don’t consider buying ts and also the Gloailes suck if you do a forehand backhand its going in no matter how bad you are it’s going in and the ai passes suck they either go 6 feet over your head or slow as a snail gasping for air or they pass it to the other team same with the goalies  don’t buy this game worst 3$ I’ve ever spent
Not the best thing I’ve played but pretty good

I randomly got gifted this game earlier tonight, and it really changed my life. We were having such a fun time playing bockey against the idiot ai's who use their realm of influence to absorb the puck from your stick like Bounty paper towel. We also discovered that the goalie likes to domain expansion out of his crease. As we were shooting the Bockey dodecahedron around, we realized that the goalies were simply playing a leisurley game of pong, and we were only getting in the way of it. This is because most of the Bockey games were simply dump and chase between the goalies. This happened throughout all of our 7 game series. We had some amazing players such as dihh 69, and alpenfury 12. Playing our 7 game series was an amazing experience, so we naturally decided to go again. As we were playing, we realized that this game was an ancient evil that needs to be sealed away because its too addicting. i felt like i was constantly injecting more heroin each game of bockey. We kept constantly playing 20 minute overtimes where no one would score, and it was like the 9th layer of hell. The occasional 2 minute long high would kick in where we would crack tons of jokes and laugh like hyenas, but the high quickly dies down. You then spiral into emotional distress trying to comprehend the ai's stupidness and how much you want to murder the ai's family. Both of us became so emotionally invested in this game, that we were getting mad at the literal machines for the smallest little thing. This continued for about 10 minutes in quintuple overtime, so we just sat in the corner twiddling with our weiners until the ai's won the game. The grief and betrayal we felt during that moment was unbearable. The moment i took off the headset i was relieved to see the real world in its glory again. I will most likely staying up all night now thinking of the insufferable ai's who won that stupid bockey game. I feel terrible.

Anyways cool game 5 stars
Bockey is such a good game, it’s so fun, the concept is amazing and the TBA also makes it so funnn!

Please read the entire review. 

VERY slow movement, annoying gameplay, weird stick, and way too much stuff crowding your face, making it hard to focus.    

   I play ice hockey IRL and i absolutely love it. It was probably the best thing to happen to me and this feels nothing like that. It is agonizing to play because most of the time it's a 1v2 against real people and absolutely clueless ai teammates, unless it's a full lobby it's either destroying the other team or getting destroyed, it's very rarely fair. You can spawn the ball underground which is fun, and I cannot stress enough how terrible the movement is, the concept is great, I love the wacky style, but the execution makes me want to execute myself.                

 I bet that most people who genuinely play this game (which is very few and for a good reason) have never actually played hockey before, and think that's what it's like. The physics on the ball gets choppy when anyone other than you or ai has the ball.       

WHY THE MOVEMENT SUCKS:    

1st. It uses the basic thumb stick movement which I dislike (not saying gtag physics would be better, cuz I hate that too) but with actual skating, there are so many cool ways to implement it, and have a fun, and more controllable way to move, but clearly they didn't do that.     

 2nd. You lose momentum wayyyy too easily. For example, it makes it almost impossible to actually turn without losing all of your momentum, and you don't gain it quickly either, it's a very slow windup with an underwhelming top speed, making the fast paced game of hockey slow and boring.   

3rd. You move in a weird arc, and I get that you are rolling or skating, but on ice you gain momentum, and as I said before, it's unbearably slow and annoying, giving almost no control or sense of control. It Just feels slow and clunky


WHY THE GAMEPLAY SUCKS: 

Firstly the ai are clueless, like in the few hours I've played the ai made more passes to the other team than to a teammate. I even had one own goal, which is astonishing to me. 

Secondly the push bubbles have to be the most annoying thing other than movement. They make it so not only can you barely move when you're alone, but now you have people pushing you making you have absolutely no control of where you move, it's like playing pinball but you're the ball. 

Last but not least, the stick physics are horrible, it's like trying to play hockey with pasta, it doesn't work, you will either tap it and it will slowly roll across the ground before stopping like you're putting in golf, or it will launch into the stratosphere trying to hit a child in an airplane. 

So please, do anything BUT buy this game if you actually like hockey, again, love the concept but the execution is sad. I would rather play a better and free sports game like Orion drift, and this game could use some pointers from that.

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite games on the quest!
reviews.review_description:
This game is a gem, it is an exciting experience and is so much fun. I keep finding myself saying “Okay, one more game.” It reminds me of when my brother and I discovered Walkabout Mini Golf, there is something special here. 
For the price, I’m surprised at how polished this is, and how well thought out the details are. The physics are really good, the usually the ball and your movement act how you would expect it to in my opinion. The AI is competent enough to be challenging. The multiplayer is a breeze to set up which is so nice considering how complicated it can be in other VR titles. I love the retro futurism vibe this game gives and it’s especially fun to play with friends and family. There is a level of skill involved and it’s very rewarding to get better as you play, making the game winning goal is exhilarating. I’m excited to see this game grow and evolve. I’d love to see more customization options or arenas to play in, even if it is paid dlc in the future, as long as they keep the same passion and attention to detail that is obviously present in this current version.

P.S. - The developers have done an amazing job with this game. I know a lot goes into game development, and not everything can be added or fits the vision the developers have. If it’s in the cards, one feature I’d like to see added if possible is hitting the bots or players with your hockey stick, even if it is just visual and it doesn’t affect them, it’d be nice to get revenge on them for scoring on me or pushing me lol

I'm going to give you an honest review since this community is blind. The game is great, if you want to play alone with bots, online is a nightmare, impossible to find a server that's not locked and when you do find one everyone is running around playing one handed hockey, which is extremely sweaty and unfun. We've seen it with games like pickup league it just isn't good. Not to mention that whenever an enemy gets the ball it turns into a choppy mess. Do not expect a good multiplayer experience out of this game, please do away with one handed hockey.

This is an awesome game, love the concept. However, for some reason when playing a local match with someone else in the same household as me I still had north of 400 ping. This basically made the game close to unplayable. We weren’t even versing anyone online and the bots carried around 400 ping as well. We live in Australia so it makes sense to not have a stable connection online, but offline it’s a requirement. Otherwise this games pretty cool and those in North America im sure your experience will be a lot better than mine and I think it would be worth the buy
